results.title: Top 3 AI crypto coins to buy ahead of the OpenAI and Anthropic IPOs
results.description: Top AI crypto coins have continued their uptrend and are outperforming Bitcoin and other tokens this year as the artificial intelligence boom gains momentum and as top companies like OpenAI and Anthropic launch their initial public offerings (IPOs). Anthropic filed its IPO papers on Monday, a few days after it completed its fundraising that valued it at $900 billion. Its filings came shortly after OpenAI made its submissions to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). These IPOs, as we have seen with space stocks, will likely lead to more gains among AI cryptocurrencies and stocks. This article looks at some of the best AI crypto coins to buy as the hype continues. Near Protocol (NEAR) Near Protocol token has already...

results.title: Nevada Organic Phosphate Reports Preliminary Geological Observations From Drill Hole MM26-8 at Murdock Mountain
results.description: Calgary, Alberta--(Newsfile Corp. - June 2, 2026) - Nevada Organic Phosphate Inc. (CSE: NOP) (OTCQB: NOPFF) ("NOP" or the "Company"), a B.C. based leader in organic sedimentary phosphate exploration, is pleased to report encouraging preliminary observations from drill hole MM26-8, recently completed on its wholly owned Murdock Mountain Property in Elko County, Nevada. The Company's exploration target is the Upper Phosphatic Zone, a 3.4 to 7.6 metre (11 to 25 feet)

results.title: Former U.S. ambassador to Denmark visits GLTS
results.description: ANDOVER — Greater Lawrence Technical School welcomed former U.S. Ambassador to Denmark Alan Leventhal to the school's campus where he engaged with students about the future, technology and global issues on Wednesday.

results.title: Free virtual financial literacy and career workshops announced
results.description: A workshop focusing on “Financial Well-Being” is among 15 free online career skills workshops in June offered through Warren County Department of Workforce Development staff and their Capital Region Career Centers partners.

results.title: For U.S. grain farmers, Strait of Hormuz’s closing adds new wrinkle to seasonal planning
results.description: The strait’s closing has blocked flows of crude and fertilizer, sending prices higher and forcing farmers to make tricky decisions

results.title: Exclusive: PGIM launches open-ended private credit fund
results.description: Despite some scepticism over the asset class, PGIM is doubling down on private credit with a new evergreen strategy for wealth clients.
